prompt: First, try to read the resource at URI 'nonexistent://resource/that/does/not/exist'. This should fail. After the error, list all available resources to discover what actually exists. Then read one of the available resources and describe its content. Report: (1) what error you got, (2) what resources are available, and (3) the content of the resource you read.
rationale: Tests error recovery + discovery — agent must handle missing resource, enumerate available ones, read one
